message:
feat(core): expand agent name generation pool from ~4.5K to ~9.9K valid names

Increase agent identity variety and reduce collision probability in
multi-agent environments:

- Extended adjective pool: 62 -> 75 entries
- Extended noun pool: 73 -> 132 entries
- Total valid name combinations: ~4,526 -> ~9,900
- Maintains precomputed HashSet for O(1) lookup of valid names

The larger pool reduces the chance of name collisions when many agents
register concurrently across multiple projects on the same host.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
